ValueSource.description: Object defining the source of a value to evaluate. IValueSource: Interface for objects defining how to extract a value from an object.

ComparisonType.description: Specifies whether the extracted value should be smaller, greater, etc. than the reference value. ValueComparisonType: Specifies the requirement to be met by a value in relation to a reference value to consider the check as passed.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
